defs: Intimate union; fellowship; alliance; companionship; confederation; association; intimacy.
quotes: A friendly consociation with your kindred elements.

defs: A voluntary and permanent council or union of neighboring Congregational churches, for mutual advice and cooperation in ecclesiastical matters; a meeting of pastors and delegates from churches thus united.
notes: ☞ In Connecticut some of the Congregational churhes are associated in consociations and the others in conferences.
